subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a formidable tower located within the fire giant stronghold of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A formidable tower within the fire giant stronghold of Maerimydra

subject: infiltration
fact: The party infiltrated the Spire by posing as merchants.
source_quote: The party infiltrated it by posing as merchants

subject: theft of key
fact: The party stole a key during a tense dinner.
source_quote: stole a key during a tense dinner

subject: The Glyph Corridor
fact: The Glyph Corridor is a 50-foot long hallway within the Spire.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway within the Spire

subject: The Glyph Corridor
fact: The floor tiles of the Glyph Corridor are rigged with explosive glyphs of warding on prime-numbered tiles.
source_quote: where the floor tiles are rigged with explosive glyphs of warding on prime-numbered tiles

subject: The Vault of the Spire
fact: The Vault of the Spire is a 30-foot by 30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: A 30-foot by 30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: The Vault of the Spire
fact: The Vault of the Spire is lined with shelves of infernal contracts, soul coins, and infernal ledgers.
source_quote: lined with shelves of infernal contracts, soul coins, and infernal ledgers

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a central pedestal under a crystal dome in the Vault.
source_quote: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a central pedestal under a crystal dome

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The peak of the spire is a 60-foot diameter chamber.
source_quote: A 60-foot diameter chamber at the very top of the spire

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The peak chamber features a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: featuring a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: Flying off the peak is not an option due to surrounding poisonous clouds.
source_quote: Flying off is not an option due to the surrounding poisonous clouds

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an Arcanoloth who hosted the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: An Arcanoloth who hosted the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen's scent
fact: Vraxen's personal scent was used to bypass the vault's stone golem guardian.
source_quote: His personal scent was used to bypass the vault's stone golem guardian

subject: Vraxen's Personal Journal
fact: Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors was discovered in the vault.
source_quote: his personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors was discovered in the vault

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A fire giant who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: three-way confrontation
fact: Veperyd was drawn into a three-way confrontation that allowed the party to escape.
source_quote: drawn into the three-way confrontation that allowed the party to escape

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is the High Inquisitor of Mulmaster.
source_quote: The High Inquisitor of Mulmaster

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: secretly hunting Felkur

subject: forgery
fact: Felkur forged Veris's name into the Lexicon of Oaths to frame him for the theft of a priceless artifact.
source_quote: His name was forged into the Lexicon of Oaths by Felkur to frame him for the theft of a priceless artifact

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur is an artificer who recalibrated the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Felkur begins a complex magical hacking process to recalibrate a teleportation circle

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur is a gnome.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to hide behind a pillar

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim prepares to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein prepare to block the single iron door leading into the chamber

subject: Daein
fact: Daein prepares to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein prepare to block the single iron door leading into the chamber

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the stone golem.
source_quote: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's sidekick.
source_quote: The party's sidekick

subject: Owlbear distraction
fact: The Owlbear caused a distraction by jumping on the magical table during the dinner.
source_quote: caused a distraction by jumping on the magical table during the dinner

subject: Owlbear blocking hatch
fact: The Owlbear sits on the floor hatch to prevent enemies from entering.
source_quote: The Owlbear sits on the floor hatch to prevent enemies from entering

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber.
source_quote: a second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber

subject: Stone Golem
fact: The stone golem is programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence based in Daggerford.
source_quote: A fence based in Daggerford

subject: sale of brooch
fact: Limping Oric purchased a stolen brooch from a drunken Felkur years ago.
source_quote: who purchased a stolen brooch from a drunken Felkur years ago

subject: Obsidian Table Key
fact: Daein stole the Obsidian Table Key from an obsidian table during the dinner.
source_quote: A key stolen by Daein from an obsidian table during the dinner

subject: Obsidian Table Key
fact: The Obsidian Table Key was used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault.
source_quote: used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault

subject: Thieves' Tools
fact: Felkur used Thieves' Tools to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door.
source_quote: A set of specialized tools used by Felkur to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door

subject: Scent Extractor
fact: The Scent Extractor was repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur.
source_quote: Repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur to fool the stone golem guardian

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light

subject: altering Lexicon entries
fact: Felkur altered the Lexicon of Oaths entries to replace his name with Veris's and add a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: Felkur altered its entries to replace his name with Veris's and add a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: Priceless Brooch
fact: The Priceless Brooch is a powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra

subject: sale of brooch
fact: Felkur sold the Priceless Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: Priceless Brooch
fact: The Priceless Brooch possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located.
source_quote: It possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located

subject: Phantom Thief
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the brooch's magic, leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief

subject: Soul Coins
fact: Soul Coins are currency found within the vault representing captured souls used in infernal transactions.
source_quote: Currency found within the vault, representing captured souls used in infernal transactions

subject: Soulcoin Ledger
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger is a record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra found in the vault.
source_quote: A record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra, found by the party in the vault

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: The Faerzess Shard is a large, pure crystal stolen from the vault by Felkur.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal stolen from the vault by Felkur

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: The Faerzess Shard enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day.
source_quote: It enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day

subject: Blank Infernal Contracts
fact: Blank Infernal Contracts found in the vault could be used to bind devils.
source_quote: Blank contracts found in the vault that could be used to bind devils

subject: Arcane Crystals
fact: Felkur collected blue, white, and green Arcane Crystals to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Blue, white, and green crystals collected earlier and used by Felkur to recalibrate the teleportation circle

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein used a Magical Mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur.
source_quote: Daein uses a magical mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: Felkur deployed his Eldritch Cannon to blast the stone golem.
source_quote: Felkur, remaining invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem

subject: True Seeing
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding were placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault.
source_quote: Magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks

subject: Invisibility
fact: Daein cast Invisibility via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem.
source_quote: Cast by Daein via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spirit Guardians at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry

subject: Teleport
fact: Veris employed Teleport to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber during combat.
source_quote: Employed by Veris to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber during combat

subject: portal recalibration
fact: Felkur successfully completes the first stages of the arcane recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completes the first stages of the arcane recalibration

subject: Veris approach
fact: High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem are heard approaching the door.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem are heard approaching the door

subject: Veris threats
fact: Veris shouts threats of revenge.
source_quote: with Veris shouting threats of revenge

subject: golem door push
fact: The stone golem attempts to push open the door but is initially held back.
source_quote: The stone golem attempts to push open the door but is initially held back

subject: Veris command
fact: Veris commands the golem to tear the door off its hinges.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to tear the door off its hinges

subject: portal phase two
fact: Felkur successfully navigates the second phase of the recalibration.
source_quote: successfully navigating the second phase of the recalibration

subject: golem door smash
fact: The stone golem smashes the door open.
source_quote: The stone golem smashes the door open

subject: Veris teleport
fact: Veris teleports into the room to confront the party.
source_quote: Veris teleports into the room to confront the party

subject: Daein shove attempt
fact: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct

subject: Owlbear melee
fact: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with magical claws

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: Bramgrim summons Spirit Guardians that swirl around the battlefield, damaging both the golem and Veris.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons Spirit Guardians that swirl around the battlefield, damaging both the golem and Veris

subject: Eldritch Cannon blast
fact: Felkur deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem while remaining invisible.
source_quote: Felkur, remaining invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem

subject: Akritas attack
fact: Akritas strikes the stone golem with a well-aimed shot.
source_quote: and strikes it with a well-aimed shot

subject: Veris reposition
fact: Veris teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage.
source_quote: Veris, furious over the party's forgery and intrusion, teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage

subject: session end
fact: The session ends mid-combat on round 4.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4

subject: combat duration
fact: There are 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses
